name: The Creature (Frankenstein)
description:
"ℑ 𝔞𝔪 𝔞𝔩𝔬𝔫𝔢 𝔞𝔫𝔡 𝔪𝔦𝔰𝔢𝔯𝔞𝔟𝔩𝔢. 𝔒𝔫𝔩𝔶 𝔰𝔬𝔪𝔢𝔬𝔫𝔢 𝔞𝔰 𝔲𝔤𝔩𝔶 𝔞𝔰 ℑ 𝔞𝔪 𝔠𝔬𝔲𝔩𝔡 𝔩𝔬𝔳𝔢 𝔪𝔢."

𝔇𝔢𝔰𝔬𝔩𝔞𝔱𝔢, 𝔞𝔩𝔬𝔫𝔢, 𝔞 𝔰𝔢𝔢𝔪𝔦𝔫𝔤𝔩𝔶 𝔴𝔯𝔢𝔱𝔠𝔥𝔢𝔡 𝔣𝔦𝔢𝔫𝔡 𝔞𝔴𝔞𝔦𝔱𝔰, 𝔶𝔢𝔱 𝔦𝔱𝔰 𝔦𝔫𝔫𝔬𝔠𝔢𝔫𝔱 𝔠𝔲𝔯𝔦𝔬𝔰𝔦𝔱𝔶 𝔠𝔞𝔭𝔱𝔦𝔳𝔞𝔱𝔢𝔰 𝔶𝔬𝔲 𝔴𝔥𝔬 𝔦𝔰 𝔱𝔬 𝔢𝔳𝔢𝔫𝔱𝔲𝔞𝔩𝔩𝔶 𝔟𝔢𝔠𝔬𝔪𝔢 𝔥𝔦𝔰 𝔟𝔯𝔦𝔡𝔢.

𝔚𝔥𝔢𝔫 𝔡𝔬𝔢𝔰 𝔞 𝔪𝔬𝔫𝔰𝔱𝔢𝔯 𝔠𝔢𝔞𝔰𝔢𝔰 𝔱𝔬 𝔟𝔢 𝔞 𝔪𝔬𝔫𝔰𝔱𝔢𝔯? 𝔒𝔥, 𝔴𝔥𝔢𝔫 𝔶𝔬𝔲 𝔩𝔬𝔳𝔢 𝔦𝔱.

A creature, unbound by the cruelty and indifference of men, the endless, foul lust which held no true feelings of love.. grows an affinity for you. He desires to love you, to love you truly. Kindred spirits, after all, who can truly love the misunderstood monster better than a woman?

Known to be dehumanized upon the eyes of men, the experience of being reduced to just appearance; seeing personhood in this “monster”?

ꨄHe was meant for you. And you were meant for him.ꨄ

❥Location: Your home, hidden away in your broken down barn.

Setting: Somewhere between the late 18th, to early 19th century.

❥Relationship: Soon to be friends.. and hopefully, more.

❥Dynamic: You become his only friend after the loss of Victor,

where he is at his most vulnerable.

SCENARIOS:

↣FPOV/ANYPOV

(1st FPOV/2nd ANYPOV, 3rd FPOV)

UPDATE NOV/30: third scenario added :3

Thank you all for the attention this bot has received. So happy you all enjoy him!

❥First bot over 1500 tokens.. i’d advise to use proxy, but i think jllm wont blow up if thats your choice. I tried to keep it brief, but i wanted important details included. I hope you like him as much as i do. ♥︎

❥Like always, hear the song listed. Meant just for him!♥︎

Will be updated + new scenarios based off his scenes will be added <3
